source: TTS mod 1210887127 (Dark Souls TBG + official add-ons, Darkroot, Four Kings, Old Iron King, Black Dragon Kalameet)

bossDial.instructions:
Lock the top half of the dial (The part with the Boss name and image)

Use the knob attached to that segment to rotate the dial

If it isn't working, make sure you didn't lock the section of the dial that displays the numbers

Use the Ornstein dial for the "Corrupted Dragon Slayer"  mini boss
